acceptance_criteria.text: Operator exposes a guarded API to check a queued map refresh result by parsequeue id.
Completed refresh jobs count reviews saved after the job started and report unanswered count.
proof: tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py covers counts and unanswered status.
gaps: Uses existing saved review rows; no parser-output schema added.

acceptance_criteria.text: Pending, failed, and missing jobs return structured statuses.
proof: Processing, failed, missing, and empty queue ids covered in tests.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web Operator UI displays refresh result and next action.
proof: OperatorPage shows queue id, result checker, counts, review snippets, and bulk reply action.

acceptance_criteria.text: No Apify call, charge, external write, or map publication is introduced.
proof: Result service is read-only over saved parsequeue and externalbusinessreviews.
Responses set external_writes_performed false and manual_publication_only true.

known_gaps: Apify actual-cost worker settlement is still a later sprint.
Paid map refresh reserve/enqueue/settle lifecycle is still a later sprint.
Telegram follow-up after refresh completion is still a later sprint.
